enforced: Lint rule selection under ruff.toml [lint] sub-table (Ruff >=0.2.0 format; top-level rule keys are deprecated)
select = E,F,I,UP,B,SIM,C4 rule groups are machine-enforced, not prose style guidance
mypy strict = true enables the full strict-mode flag bundle (disallow-untyped-defs, no-implicit-optional, etc.)
warn_unused_ignores / warn_redundant_casts catch stale type-ignore comments
